title: The Passive – actions, systems and processes III

questions.question: The contract ___ signed by both parties before work began.
Waste ___ sorted into three categories at this facility.
The regulations ___ reviewed annually by the committee.
The witness ___ being protected by the authorities.
Millions of vaccines ___ distributed across the country.
The error ___ detected during routine maintenance.
All staff ___ informed of the changes by email.
The server ___ backed up every night automatically.
The prisoners ___ released after the peace agreement.
New guidelines ___ issued to all departments.
The building has ___ demolished to make way for a park.
The results ___ due to be published next week.
His personal data ___ used without his consent.
The pipes ___ laid before the road was resurfaced.
The new app ___ downloaded over a million times.
All employees must ___ given safety training.
The proposal ___ rejected by the board.
The products ___ tested for quality before dispatch.
The decision ___ made without consulting anyone.
